mapper.sql: id, create_user, create_dept, create_time, update_user, update_time, status, is_deleted, tenant_id, applicant_type, natural_person_name, natural_person_id_card, natural_person_phone, natural_person_address, natural_person_email, legal_person_name, legal_person_unified_code, legal_person_representative, legal_person_phone, legal_person_address, legal_person_email, application_no, application_reason, application_content, document_no, file_name, other_description, identity_proof_attachment, provide_method, obtain_method, application_time, application_status, audit_user, audit_time, audit_remark, remark
mapper.select: SELECT application_no, CASE applicant_type WHEN 1 THEN '自然人' WHEN 2 THEN '法人其他组织' ELSE '未知' END AS applicant_type_name, CASE applicant_type WHEN 1 THEN natural_person_name WHEN 2 THEN legal_person_name ELSE '' END AS applicant_name, CASE applicant_type WHEN 1 THEN natural_person_id_card WHEN 2 THEN legal_person_unified_code ELSE '' END AS id_card_or_code, CASE applicant_type WHEN 1 THEN natural_person_phone WHEN 2 THEN legal_person_phone ELSE '' END AS phone, CASE applicant_type WHEN 1 THEN natural_person_address WHEN 2 THEN legal_person_address ELSE '' END AS address, application_reason, application_content, document_no, file_name, other_description, identity_proof_attachment, provide_method, obtain_method, application_time, CASE application_status WHEN 0 THEN '待审核' WHEN 1 THEN '已通过' WHEN 2 THEN '已拒绝' WHEN 3 THEN '已撤回' ELSE '未知' END AS application_status_name, CAST(audit_user AS CHAR) AS audit_user_name, audit_time, audit_remark, remark FROM biz_public_archive_application ${ew.customSqlSegment}
